Know More Department of Neuro Sciences The greatest medical wonder needs the sharpest minds. Know More Department of Parkinson Disease & Movement Disorders When it comes to your movement, get help from the best! Know More Department of Cardiac Sciences The experts are here to help your heart Know More Department of Orthopaedics Get back to life with our comprehensive orthopaedic care Know More Department of Spine Surgery When it comes to your spine, we have your back. Know More Department of Gastroenterology & Hepatobiliary Get comprehensive end-to-end care for gastrointestinal, liver and pancreatic disorders Know More Department of Obstetrics and Gynaecology We will help your little one arrive safe and sound. Know More Department of Oncology Let us help you get a second chance at life. Comprehensive Cancer Care Know More Department of Emergency & Trauma Care Prompt services that save lives Call : 080 45004600 Know More Health Checkup Packages End-to-end Health Care Services Know More Quality & Safety Certified Know More Department of Organ Transplantation Know More Open ICU Concept with Glass Pathway Be near your loved ones 24/7 Know More Special Privileges for Balyam Card Holders A special privilege club for kids up to 18 years old Know More Vikram Hospital serves as one of the best heart hospitals in the country. We provide
                    comprehensive heart care services delivering the best possible treatment using cutting-edge
                    technology, innovative techniques and an expert cardiologist team. From diagnostic to surgical techniques and complex to minimally-invasive surgeries, we excel
                    across the entire heart care spectrum making us one of the best heart surgery hospitals. To name
                    a few procedures, we perform angioplasty and stenting,open heart surgery, valve replacement,
                    pacemaker implantation, Ventricular Assistive Device surgery, and so on. With the usage of
                    modern technology across diagnostic as well as surgical dimensions, we are able to deliver the
                    best treatment possible to all our patients which is at par with the international standards. KNOW MORE CONTACT US Vikram Hospital’s Department of Neurosciences combines the expertise of the best neurosurgery,
                    neurology, neuro-oncology and interventional neuro-radiology specialists with state-of-the-art
                    diagnostic equipment and advanced surgical technology to offer the most effective treatment to
                    our patients. With more than 100 years of combined experience, our expert's vast knowledge enables them to
                    provide the simplest of solutions for highly complex neurological problems. KNOW MORE CONTACT US The Gastroenterology department at Vikram is a one-stop destination for Gastro-Intestinal
                    disorders, including surgeries for malignancies. Annually our centres perform 5000 minimally
                    invasive endoscopies, colonoscopies, small bowel enteroscopies and endoscopic ultrasonography. To provide the most effective treatment for our patients problems we have top-line equipment that
                    helps our specialists work easy and efficient. We have 24 hours ambulatory pH monitoring with 6
                    channel impendence monitoring, which is first of its kind in South India because of that we are
                    the best gastroenterology hospital in Bangalore. KNOW MORE CONTACT US Vikram Hospital now providing regular checkups to treat and prevent potential health problems
                    through out the course of the pregnancy while promoting healthy lifestyles that benefit both
                    mother and child. During checkups, pregnant women will receive medical information over maternal
                    physiological changes in pregnancy, biological changes, and prenatal nutrition including
                    prenatal vitamins. Recommendations on management and healthy lifestyle changes are also made during regular
                    checkups. The availability of routine prenatal care has played a part in reducing maternal death
                    rates and miscarriages as well as birth defects, low birth weight, neonatal infections and other
                    preventable health problems. KNOW MORE CONTACT US Our expertise in childhood wellness is only rivaled by our excellent infrastructure and support
                    staff. From Paediatric critical care to general paediatry, our motto is to provide the most
                    comfortable environment for children and their guardians. With kid-friendly spaces, experienced
                    nursing staff and decorated physicians, we have made this motto our reality. Come to the
                    Department of Paediatrics at Vikram Hospital and experience this in person. KNOW
                        MORE CONTACT US A renal science department which deals with diseases of the male and female urinary tract and the
                    male reproductive organs. Although the renal science department is divided into medical &
                    surgical specialty, a knowledge of internal medicine, paediatrics, gynecology, and other
                    specialties is required by the neurologist & the urologist because of the wide variety of
                    clinical problems encountered. In recognition of the wide scope of urology & nephrology. KNOW

                    with all modern facilities." Daljit Sethi "Recently had to take a relative who was admitted. Good international experience, kind nurses. We
